{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = Long Silence
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Long Silence]] was an event brought about by a previous [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c8">''The Engineer'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
